TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Serzh Azati Sargsyan == ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 6, Serzh Azati Sargsyan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Armenia ta' misuw hya' ga Serzh Azati Sargsyan, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2008 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Serzh Azati Sargsyan maki tay kawas 1983 msqun ki Rita Sargsyan, tehuk misuw qani. Rita Sargsyan ga, kneril ni Serzh Azati Sargsyan. pinqbaqan nya Serzh Azati Sargsyan, t'aring kawas tay 1971 tehuk kawas tay 1979, mqwas biru sa Yerevan State University pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Serzh Azati Sargsyan sa kawas 1990, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == s~…ēerzńß azati s~…ēar…£s~…ējan == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, s~…ēerzńß azati s~…ēar…£s~…ējan, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw armenia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēerzńß azati s~…ēar…£s~…ējan, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan nja s~…ēerzńß azati s~…ēar…£s~…ējan maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki rita s~…ēar…£s~…ējan, teńßuk mis~…ēuw qani. rita s~…ēar…£s~…ējan …£a, kneril ni s~…ēerzńß azati s~…ēar…£s~…ējan. pinqő≤aqan nja s~…ēerzńß azati s~…ēar…£s~…ējan, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk kawas~…ē taj ****, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa jere*an s~…ētate uni*ers~…ēitj pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. mintzjuwaw nja s~…ēerzńß azati s~…ēar…£s~…ējan s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Serzh Azati Sargsyan == ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 6, Serzh Azati Sargsyan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Armenia ta' misuw hya' ga Serzh Azati Sargsyan, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2008 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Serzh Azati Sargsyan maki tay kawas 1983 msqun ki Rita Sargsyan, tehuk misuw qani. Rita Sargsyan ga, kneril ni Serzh Azati Sargsyan. pinqbaqan nya Serzh Azati Sargsyan, t'aring kawas tay 1971 tehuk kawas tay 1979, mqwas biru sa Yerevan State University pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Serzh Azati Sargsyan sa kawas 1990, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == s~…ēerzńß azati s~…ēar…£s~…ējan == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, s~…ēerzńß azati s~…ēar…£s~…ējan, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē.
